get_weather.short_desc: Fetch current weather conditions for a location.
get_weather.detailed_desc: Retrieves real-time weather data including temperature, humidity, wind speed, and forecasts for any city or coordinates.

translate_text.detailed_desc: Uses NLP translation APIs to convert text from one language to another, supporting 100+ languages with dialect awareness.

create_calendar_event.short_desc: Create a new event on a calendar.
create_calendar_event.detailed_desc: Adds a scheduled event to Google Calendar or Outlook with title, time, attendees, and optional video conferencing links.

search_web.short_desc: Search the internet for up-to-date information.
search_web.detailed_desc: Performs a web search via a search engine API and returns ranked results with titles, URLs, and snippets.

run_code.short_desc: Execute a code snippet in a sandboxed environment.
run_code.detailed_desc: Runs Python, JavaScript, or Bash code in an isolated runtime and returns stdout, stderr, and exit codes.

read_file.short_desc: Read the contents of a file from a path or URL.
read_file.detailed_desc: Opens and returns the text content of local files or remote URLs, supporting txt, csv, json, and markdown formats.

write_file.short_desc: Write or overwrite content to a file.
write_file.detailed_desc: Creates or overwrites a file at a given path with specified text content, useful for saving outputs or generated data.

query_database.short_desc: Run a SQL query against a connected database.
query_database.detailed_desc: Executes SQL SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE statements against a configured relational database and returns results as JSON.

fetch_url.short_desc: Retrieve the HTML content of a web page.
fetch_url.detailed_desc: Performs an HTTP GET request to a URL and returns the response body, headers, and status code for scraping or API calls.

post_to_slack.short_desc: Send a message to a Slack channel or user.
post_to_slack.detailed_desc: Uses the Slack API to post formatted messages, alerts, or notifications to specific channels or direct message threads.

create_jira_ticket.short_desc: Create a new Jira issue or task.
create_jira_ticket.detailed_desc: Submits a new ticket to a Jira project with title, description, assignee, priority, and issue type via the Jira REST API.

get_github_repo_info.short_desc: Fetch metadata about a GitHub repository.
get_github_repo_info.detailed_desc: Retrieves repository details from GitHub including stars, forks, open issues, contributors, and recent commits.

generate_image.short_desc: Generate an image from a text prompt.
generate_image.detailed_desc: Calls an image generation model (e.g., DALL-E or Stable Diffusion) with a prompt and style parameters, returning an image URL.

text_to_speech.detailed_desc: Uses a TTS engine to synthesize natural-sounding speech from text, with options for voice, speed, and output format.

speech_to_text.detailed_desc: Processes an audio file or stream using ASR (automatic speech recognition) and returns a text transcript with timestamps.

summarize_document.short_desc: Generate a concise summary of a document.
summarize_document.detailed_desc: Uses an LLM to produce a structured summary of long text documents, PDFs, or web pages with configurable length.

classify_sentiment.short_desc: Detect the sentiment of a text snippet.
classify_sentiment.detailed_desc: Analyzes text and returns a sentiment label (positive, neutral, negative) with a confidence score using NLP classification.

extract_entities.detailed_desc: Performs NER (Named Entity Recognition) on input text to identify people, organizations, locations, dates, and other entities.

convert_currency.detailed_desc: Fetches live exchange rates and converts a specified monetary amount from one currency to another.

get_news_headlines.short_desc: Fetch top news headlines for a topic or region.
get_news_headlines.detailed_desc: Queries a news API to return the latest headlines, sources, and article URLs filtered by keyword, category, or country.

upload_to_s3.short_desc: Upload a file to an AWS S3 bucket.
upload_to_s3.detailed_desc: Transfers a local file to a specified S3 bucket and key path, with optional ACL settings and metadata tags.

download_from_s3.short_desc: Download a file from an AWS S3 bucket.
download_from_s3.detailed_desc: Retrieves a file from a specified S3 bucket and saves it locally or returns its content as bytes.

send_sms.short_desc: Send an SMS text message to a phone number.
send_sms.detailed_desc: Uses Twilio or a similar SMS gateway to deliver a text message to a specified phone number with optional sender ID.

create_spreadsheet.short_desc: Create a new spreadsheet with data.
create_spreadsheet.detailed_desc: Generates an Excel or Google Sheets spreadsheet from tabular data, with support for formatting, formulas, and multiple sheets.

parse_pdf.short_desc: Extract text and metadata from a PDF file.
parse_pdf.detailed_desc: Parses a PDF document to return raw text, page count, tables, and embedded metadata like author and creation date.

resize_image.short_desc: Resize an image to specified dimensions.
resize_image.detailed_desc: Takes an image URL or file path and returns a resized version at the target width and height, preserving or cropping aspect ratio.

ocr_image.short_desc: Extract text from an image using OCR.
ocr_image.detailed_desc: Applies optical character recognition to detect and extract printed or handwritten text from an image file or URL.

get_user_profile.short_desc: Retrieve a user's profile data from the system.
get_user_profile.detailed_desc: Fetches account details such as name, email, role, preferences, and activity history for a given user ID.

update_user_profile.short_desc: Update fields in a user's profile.
update_user_profile.detailed_desc: Patches one or more fields (name, email, preferences, etc.) on a user record in the system database.

log_event.short_desc: Log a structured event to an analytics or monitoring system.
log_event.detailed_desc: Sends a timestamped event payload with properties to a logging backend like Datadog, Mixpanel, or a custom endpoint.

create_stripe_payment.short_desc: Initiate a payment charge via Stripe.
create_stripe_payment.detailed_desc: Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent or Charge for a specified amount and currency, returning a client secret or confirmation.

get_product_inventory.short_desc: Check stock levels for a product.
get_product_inventory.detailed_desc: Queries the inventory management system for current stock counts, warehouse location, and reorder thresholds for a SKU.

place_order.short_desc: Place a product order in an e-commerce system.
place_order.detailed_desc: Submits a purchase order with items, quantities, shipping address, and payment method to an order management system.

track_shipment.short_desc: Get real-time tracking status for a shipment.
track_shipment.detailed_desc: Fetches tracking events and estimated delivery date from a carrier API (UPS, FedEx, DHL) using a tracking number.

get_crypto_price.short_desc: Fetch the current price of a cryptocurrency.
get_crypto_price.detailed_desc: Retrieves real-time price, market cap, 24h volume, and percentage change for a given crypto asset from an exchange API.

scrape_table.short_desc: Extract a table from a web page.
scrape_table.detailed_desc: Fetches a URL and parses HTML tables using CSS selectors or index, returning structured data as a list of dictionaries.

call_rest_api.short_desc: Make an arbitrary REST API call.
call_rest_api.detailed_desc: Sends an HTTP request (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) to any REST endpoint with custom headers, query params, and body.

get_system_metrics.short_desc: Retrieve CPU, memory, and disk metrics from a server.
get_system_metrics.detailed_desc: Polls a server or cloud instance for system resource utilization including CPU %, RAM usage, disk I/O, and network throughput.

deploy_service.short_desc: Deploy or redeploy a cloud service.
deploy_service.detailed_desc: Triggers a deployment pipeline for a specified service version on a cloud provider (AWS, GCP, Azure) or Kubernetes cluster.

get_analytics_report.short_desc: Pull an analytics report for a date range.
get_analytics_report.detailed_desc: Queries Google Analytics, Amplitude, or a custom BI tool for user metrics like sessions, conversions, and retention over a time window.

create_pdf_report.short_desc: Generate a formatted PDF report from data.
create_pdf_report.detailed_desc: Renders a PDF document from a template and data payload, supporting tables, charts, headers, footers, and embedded images.

schedule_task.short_desc: Schedule a task or job to run at a future time.
schedule_task.detailed_desc: Registers a deferred task in a job queue (e.g., Celery, AWS SQS) to execute a function or webhook at a specified datetime.

cancel_task.detailed_desc: Removes a pending job from the task queue by task ID before it has been executed.

get_document_embeddings.short_desc: Generate vector embeddings for a text document.
get_document_embeddings.detailed_desc: Calls an embedding model API to produce a high-dimensional vector representation of input text for semantic search or clustering.

semantic_search.short_desc: Search a vector store using natural language.
semantic_search.detailed_desc: Embeds a query and performs ANN (approximate nearest neighbor) search over a vector database to return semantically relevant results.

send_push_notification.short_desc: Send a push notification to a mobile device.
send_push_notification.detailed_desc: Delivers a push alert via FCM or APNs to a specific device token with a title, body, and optional deep-link payload.

check_domain_availability.short_desc: Check if a domain name is available for registration.
check_domain_availability.detailed_desc: Queries a WHOIS or registrar API to determine if a domain is taken, available, or in a redemption/pending-delete state.

get_ip_geolocation.short_desc: Get geographic data for an IP address.
get_ip_geolocation.detailed_desc: Looks up an IP address and returns its country, region, city, ISP, timezone, and approximate lat/lon coordinates.

validate_email.short_desc: Validate the format and deliverability of an email address.
validate_email.detailed_desc: Checks email syntax, domain MX records, and optionally pings the SMTP server to verify if an address is deliverable.

diff_text.short_desc: Compare two text strings and return their differences.
diff_text.detailed_desc: Performs a line-by-line or word-level diff between two text inputs, returning added, removed, and unchanged segments.
